name: Chunk 7/14
text:
# Teradata Migration  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
logo  
Harnessing AI to streamline code and data migration for accelerated timelines and superior business outcomes.Achieving unprecedented efficiency in complex Teradata migration by accelerating processes with GENAI Copilot.  
Monumental Migration Challenge  
Migrating a massive Teradata environment posed significant cost and technical limitations to modernization efforts.  
Aggressive Timeline Constraints  
The migration had a 60–70% shorter timeline than industry standards due to contractual demands.  
Comprehensive Migration Scope  
The project included code conversion, data hydration into a modern Data Lakehouse, and system repointing.  
Innovative Technical Solutions  
Advanced expertise and innovative methods ensured quality delivery within a complex, condensed timeline.  
| Migration Component                | Details                                    |
|------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Data Volume                        | 50+ TB                                     |
| Stored Procedures                  | ~ 700 Procedures  (2.5+ Mil Lines of Code) |
| Complex Views                      | ~ 6500Views                                |
| Users                              | XXX+ Users                                 |
| Reports                            | ~ 300 Reports                              |
| Downstream Applications + Extracts | ~ 700 Applications                         |  
| Phase        | Time Reduction   |
|--------------|------------------|
| Analysis     | 25%              |
| Design       | 30%              |
| Conversion   | 60%              |
| User Testing | 20%              |  
IBM & Nationwide – Gen AI Demo

name: Chunk 9/14
text:
# Quality Assurance Assistant  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025 – IBM internal  
Challenge:  
Nationwide’s Quality Assurance team struggle to manually check <5% sample of customer interactions.  
Manual sampling leaves a major blind spot for service levels and regulatory exposure.  
Developed Solution:  
Gen AI assistant to review transcribed calls to identify vulnerability and signals of complaints  
Ensure customer contact rectified if required and to inform service level improvements.  
60-70 users today – 100+ planned in scaled rollout  
logo  
Cases assessed through tool to date  
3600  
17 seconds  
91%  
Accuracy of issue identification  
Avg solution processing time versus avg 10-12 min.  call listening  
90 days  
Potential for time saved on current sample size. ~1750 days if decision for “100% sample”  
Thank You

name: Chunk 10/14
text:
# Chat with Data (POC)  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
Challenge:  
NBS holds large volumes of scattered knowledge across SharePoint, Teams, Service Now, and Confluence. Each new Chat-with-Data use case required a bespoke build such as manual indexing, RAG setup, and repeated engineering effort. No unified, reusable pattern existed for ingestion, retrieval and query handling.  
Developed Solution:  
Built a reusable agentic RAG pattern in Microsoft AI Foundry with Terraform provisioning that automates end-to-end workflows.The POC established a single, repeatable template that can index data from multiple sources and be deployed as a modular plug-and-play component for future Chat-with-Data use cases.  
Use case learnings -Pathfinder for Agent delivery, repeatable patterns on RAG.  
logo  
85%  
Retrieval Precision on Teams Data  
Reduction in engineering effort for new retrieval systems  
60%

name: Chunk 11/14
text:
# Dynamic Pricing Optimization(POC)  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
Challenge:  
Pricing team received daily competitor and product-rate data in Excel, requiring manual product mapping, competitor selection, and rate-adjustment simulations. Each iteration to evaluate ranking, volume, and margin impact took significant analyst time and created inconsistency across decisions.  
Developed Solution:  
Delivered a deterministic ML-driven pricing engine that uses historical searchbehavior data to predict the likelihood of customers selecting a given product.The solution automates ranking, volume forecasting, and margin estimation, enablingdata-backed rate adjustments instead of manual Excel scenarios.  
Use case learnings –repeatable patterns, real-time pricingoptimisationacross thewider product portfolio.  
logo  
Buy-to-Let mortgage products targeted  
110+  
75%  
Of product-selection captured accurately  
Of the actual TMW's wins were identified correctly  
68%

name: Chunk 12/14
text:
# Complaints Letter Generation  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
Challenge:  
Nationwide receive over 1000 complaints per week. Each Complaint must be reviewed and the outcome crafted into a final response letter.  
This letter takes 45 minutes to manually write and there were quality and consistency concerns.  
Developed Solution:  
Deterministic Gen AI letter generator, that uses Retrieval Augmented Generation to refer to gold standard letters and complaint case notes to generate professional letters.  
Use case learnings – Pathfinder for delivery and governance defined, repeatable patterns  
logo  
Complaint hander population planned post system upgrade  
100%  
90%  
Time saving on AI Generated Letters (45mins to 4)  
Very good or good ratings from existing complaint handlers for the vast majority of AI-generated examples  
High Quality
